title: SRS Container
description: A lightweight grouping boundary over a collection of instances. Containers answer scoping questions — which instances belong together — that the Relation graph alone cannot answer.

containerId.description: Stable UUID for this Container. Must not appear in Relation.sourceInstanceId or targetInstanceId.

name.description: Optional machine-readable name within the namespace.

description.description: Optional description of the Container's purpose.

containerType.description: Soft-deprecated hint (RFC-009). When rootInstanceIds is present, SHOULD equal the resolved root Type's name field (bare name, not namespace/name). A mismatch is diagnostic-only; the Container remains valid. See RFC-009 I-64.

rootInstanceIds.description: Top-level instances this Container was created to hold. Implementations may derive nested members by traversing contains Relations from these roots.

memberInstanceIds.description: Explicit membership list for all instances in scope. When present, allows membership queries without graph traversal.

tags.description: Vocabulary-backed topic labels (RFC-009 + RFC-006). When a Vocabulary in the package declares Terms for a tag key, tags MUST resolve per RFC-006 vocabulary resolution rules. Free-string tags are valid when no Vocabulary governs the key.

meta.description: Implementation-local metadata. Cross-system keys should be namespaced.
